description: This file defines API endpoints for managing announcements within a web application backend using FastAPI. It includes routes for listing, retrieving, creating, and updating announcements, and integrates with services, WebSocket notifications, and audit logging.

methods.name: AnnouncementResponse _to_response(a)
methods.description: Converts an announcement object to its response schema.

methods.name: AnnouncementResponse create_announcement( req: Request, payload: AnnouncementCreateRequest, admin: AppUser = Depends(require_admin), db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db_session), )
AnnouncementResponse get_announcement( announcement_id: uuid.UUID, _viewer: AppUser = Depends(get_current_user), db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db_session), )
list[AnnouncementResponse] list_announcements( limit: int = 50, offset: int = 0, _viewer: AppUser = Depends(get_current_user), db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db_session), )

AnnouncementResponse update_announcement( req: Request, announcement_id: uuid.UUID, payload: AnnouncementUpdateRequest, admin: AppUser = Depends(require_admin), db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db_session), )

calls: write_audit_log(db=db, request=req, actor_user_id=admin.id, actor_email=admin.email, action=..., entity_type=..., entity_id=a.id, details=... )
